title: South Korea's Kospi tops 7,000 to hit a new high as heavyweight Samsung surges 15%
summary_full: Signaling diplomatic efforts for resolving the Middle East crisis were on track, Trump said the U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz had been paused.
summary_public: Signaling diplomatic efforts for resolving the Middle East crisis were on track, Trump said the U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz had been paused.
